statements.__comment__: NaisTeam RESPONSIBLE_FOR KubernetesPod via NaisApp -> KubernetesNamespace
statements.query: MATCH (t:NaisTeam)-[:HAS_APP]->(a:NaisApp)-[:RUNS_IN]->(ns:KubernetesNamespace)<-[:CONTAINS]-(pod:KubernetesPod) MERGE (t)-[r:RESPONSIBLE_FOR]->(pod) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (t:NaisTeam)-[r:RESPONSIBLE_FOR]->(pod:KubernetesPod) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

statements.__comment__: KubernetesPod DEPLOYED_FROM GitHubRepository via NaisApp -> RUNS_IMAGE -> KubernetesContainer <- CONTAINS <- KubernetesPod. Requires the pod to actually contain the container running the NaisApp image, eliminating namespace-level fanout where all pods in a team namespace were incorrectly linked to every app repo.
statements.query: MATCH (a:NaisApp)-[:RUNS_IMAGE]->(c:KubernetesContainer)<-[:CONTAINS]-(pod:KubernetesPod) MATCH (a)-[:ACTIVE_DEPLOYMENT]->(d:NaisDeployment)-[:DEPLOYED_FROM]->(repo:GitHubRepository) MERGE (pod)-[r:DEPLOYED_FROM]->(repo) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment__: Delete stale pod DEPLOYED_FROM GitHubRepository relationships
statements.query: MATCH (pod:KubernetesPod)-[r:DEPLOYED_FROM]->(repo:GitHubRepository) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted
